title: NanineAgribusiness

nanine agribusiness for healthy & superb supplies 01 about us we are the best in agribusiness nanine business enterprise co. ltd is a registered private limited company in the united republic of tanzania. our business operations are based in mbeya-tukuyu, rungwe and kyela district. our dar es salaam office is more of management and administrative works. avocado farming & exports view details farming & exportation of coffee view details trading in cocoa view details nanine cereals view details our service nanine avocado operations nanine avocado is a registered brand of nanine business enterprise. as a registered brand, nanine avocado deals with: farming nanine business enterprise does
